texto: There are whole months at a time when my head is so full of ideas that I wake in the middle of the night and lie in the dark telling myself stories. There are also long, dark nights when I just know I'll never write another word: I'm finished, empty, a husk... Oh dear, yes, twitch, yawn, how I've suffered insomnia for my art.
explicacao: Citação de Debi Gliori sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “There are whole months at a time when my head is so full of ideas that I wake in the middle of th…” articula autoestima, art, myself em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.

There are also long, dark nights when I just know I'll never write another word: I'm finished, empty, a husk... Oh dear, yes, twitch, yawn, how I've suffered insomnia for my art.

texto: Bombs Away!" he yelled, swooping low over StregaSchloss. He saw little figures on the ground fleeing from the large green projectile that was speeding their way. "And a direct hit, if I'm not mistaken," he observed to himself. With a tremendous slapping sound, Ffup's digestive overload landed on a human target. There was a scream, a ghastly choking sound, and then silence.

texto: I call my golden retriever Cara my 'white wolf.' She's changed my attitude and made me write this book where the wolf is the hero, not the villain.

texto: Small said, "But what about when we are dead and gone, will you love me then, does love go on?"…Large (replied) "Look at the stars, how they shine and glow, some of the stars died a long time ago. Still they shine in the evening skies, for you see…love like starlight never dies…
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Debi Gliori: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Small said, "But what about when we are dead and gone, will you love me then, does love go on?"…L…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, death-and-dying, stars pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e stars.
